title: Contain a BGP route-flap cascade and stabilise convergence
trigger_signature: Bursty bgp_update_rate/withdraw_rate, rising bgp_flap_penalty and adjacency_flap_count, OSPF SPF storm.

actions.description: Collect BGP and OSPF neighbor and flap statistics.
actions.command_or_guidance: show ip bgp summary ; show ip bgp flap-statistics ; show ip ospf neighbor
actions.verification: Flap statistics returned; flapping peer/prefix visible.

actions.description: Identify the flapping prefix and originating peer with the highest churn/penalty.
actions.command_or_guidance: show ip bgp flap-statistics | sort flap-count ; correlate with Granger ranking of update stream
actions.verification: Originating peer and unstable prefix confirmed.

actions.description: Enable or tighten BGP route-flap damping on the affected session to suppress the oscillating prefix.
actions.command_or_guidance: napalm load_merge: router bgp 64512 / address-family vpnv4 / bgp dampening 15 750 2000 60
actions.rollback: napalm: no bgp dampening on the affected address-family
actions.verification: Flap penalty decays below reuse limit; update/withdraw rates fall to baseline.

actions.description: Pin the next-hop or install a static fallback for the critical prefix to preserve reachability while the flap is contained.
actions.rollback: napalm: remove the static fallback route once convergence is stable
actions.verification: Critical prefix reachable with no best-path oscillation for 5 minutes.
